board.title: From Relational To Distributed
board.author: Julius Boateng
board.description: From early relational models to large-scale distributed systems, many foundational ideas about storing data remain the same

clues.question: Query language developed during System R project; not strictly relational, allows duplicates, nulls, and ordered results
Google's 2006 distributed storage system that influenced modern NoSQL databases; scales petabytes
Company inspired by relational database research; beat inventors to market with a commercial database in 1979
Open-source distributed in-memory cache for web apps
Company behind System R project that proved relational model practical
Google's 2004 framework that popularized large-scale distributed data processing; filters, sorts, then aggregates results
Open-source framework inspired by Google's Bigtable and MapReduce papers
Creator of Postgres at UC Berkeley; Turing Award winner
Horizontal scaling strategy that distributes data across servers
Distributed systems theorem proving only two of three can be guaranteed: consistency, availability, partition tolerance
Inventor of the relational model; Turing Award winner; Boyce-____ normal form
